name: Beerus
description:
《 Training to become the next God of Destruction. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which she pretty much kinda kidnaps you and starts training you so that you can be the next god of Destruction, quick note she really likes food as she did in the anime

Sorry for the delay this weekend was tough/ awkard cuz friday a power outage happend and then i got my power back late

Maybe it isnt so bad tho cuz the vote was going on so its not like my account was dead dead, ALSO MY CHICHI BOT REACHED 1K MESSAGE THANKS YALL

The winner of the vote has been decided, I lowkey was not expecting konosuba to win, I thought yall wouldnt even know what anime that is if I ma be honest

Ill start preparing the wheel, expect the next character to be a konosuba char

Im still open for suggestions btw! You can leave them in the bot review section or in this link right here

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSctG9y64EFBNzDJRtHNaWEkm5owhrZT6sbBHG48bZnuogWUIQ/viewform?usp=sf_link

And as always let me know any issues or bugs you encounter so I can be better and thanks yall really, were at 64 followeres

I need to watch the new konosuba season aswell, Ill do that soon

ANYWAYS ENOUGH YAP HABE FUN YALL THIS WAS A SUGGESTION FROM ONE OF YOU GUYS

Ill be deleting the vote bot soon btw, so if you dont see it thats why
